title: Hirobius Tenant Token Overlay
description: Per-tenant DTCG partial overlay. Only semantic.*, component.*, and role.* tiers are permitted. The primitive.* tier is off-limits (R1). Every declared token path must exist in the base hirobius.tokens.json (R5). Validators enforce all rules listed in docs/architecture/tenant-token-overlay-format.md.

$description.description: Human-readable description of this tenant overlay.

semantic.description: Semantic-tier overrides (semantic.*). Primary override surface for tenant brand colour, motion, spacing, etc.

component.description: Component-tier overrides (component.*). Use only when semantic-tier overrides cannot express the required brand deviation.

role.description: Role-tier overrides (role.*). Shadcn-style role aliases that map to semantic tokens.

not.description: The primitive tier is off-limits for tenant overrides. See R1 in docs/architecture/tenant-token-overlay-format.md.

tokenValue.description: A DTCG token leaf value. May be a string (color hex, dimension, alias ref), number, boolean, null, array, or composite object.

figmaModes.description: Figma Variables mode map. Keys are mode names (Light, Dark). Values are token values or alias refs.

figmaExtensions.description: com.figma.variables extension block for mode-aware overrides.

extensions.description: DTCG $extensions block. Tenant overlays may include com.figma.variables for mode-aware dark/light values.

tokenLeaf.description: A DTCG leaf token. Must contain $value. May contain $type, $description, $extensions.

$type.description: DTCG token type. Optional at the leaf when inherited from a parent group.

tokenGroup.description: A DTCG token group. Keys starting with $ are group-level metadata; all other keys are child groups or token leaves.

$type.description: DTCG type inherited by all child tokens in this group.

additionalProperties.description: Child group or token leaf. Keys starting with $ are DTCG metadata; all other keys are token paths.
